qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_categoria as oi_categoria, t0.c_categoria as c_categoria, t0.d_categoria as d_categoria, SEC.policy, t0.c_categoria as CODE, t0.d_categoria as TEXT FROM QYR12_CATEGORIAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Categorias.CATEGORIA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_categoria LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_categoria asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_categoria as oi_categoria, SEC.policy FROM QYR12_CATEGORIAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Categorias.CATEGORIA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_categoria LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_categoria asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Categorias.CATEGORIA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Categorias.CATEGORIA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(QYR12_CATEGORIAS.oi_categoria) as CNT from QYR12_CATEGORIAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and QYR12_CATEGORIAS.oi_categoria={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(QYR12_CATEGORIAS.d_categoria,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(QYR12_CATEGORIAS.c_categoria,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
